# Claire Fraser

Bioinformatics | Data Science | NGS Analysis

I build reproducible bioinformatics pipelines, develop tools for interactive data visualization, and apply evolutionary and statistical methods to extract biological insight from high-throughput sequencing data.

---

## Featured Projects

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="33%"}
### [NGS Figure Generator](projects/seq-visualizer.qmd)
Interactive tool for generating publication-ready figures from sequencing data.

[![ ](images/volcano.png)](projects/seq-visualizer.qmd)
:::

::: {.column width="33%"}
### [ONT Methylation Pipeline](projects/ont-methylation.qmd)
End-to-end pipeline for methylation analysis using Oxford Nanopore data.

[![ ](images/ont-methylation_flowchart.png)](projects/ont-methylation.qmd)
:::

::: {.column width="33%"}
### [SARS-CoV-2 Analysis](projects/sars-cov2.qmd)
Phylogenetic and evolutionary analysis of SARS-CoV-2.

[![ ](images/sars-cov2-casevarrtplots.png)](projects/sars-cov2.qmd)
:::

:::
